product_overview: Buddy is a secure, personalized voice-first assistant that combines real-time Gemini Live interactions with reminders, user preferences, and an integrated retrieval-augmented knowledge (RAG) system to support health and daily routines.
core_goals: Enable secure user authentication and personalized sessions.
Provide low-latency real-time voice interactions using Gemini Live and WebSocket transport.
Offer CRUD reminder management with worker-driven notifications.
Expose user settings for personalization and persistent preferences.
Support RAG-style knowledge queries with cited sources for accurate responses.

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Register and authenticate users, returning JWT sessions for subsequent authenticated API calls.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/signup with {email, password, name} -> Receive 201 Created with userId
POST /api/auth/login with valid {email, password} -> Receive 200 with JWT token and user profile
POST /api/auth/login with invalid password -> Receive 401 Unauthorized with error message
POST /api/auth/signup with already-registered email -> Receive 409 Conflict with error message

features.name: Voice Assistant Session
features.description: Create and manage a real-time voice session (Gemini Live) for streaming audio, transcripts, and assistant responses using a session API and WebSocket connections.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token
GET /api/voice/session with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with {sessionId, websocketUrl, ttl}
CONNECT to websocketUrl (ws/wss) with sessionId in connection parameters -> Receive 101/connected confirmation
SEND audio chunk frame to websocket -> Receive transcript and assistant response events on websocket
GET /api/voice/session with invalid or expired token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized
GET /api/voice/session with valid token but upstream Gemini service error -> Receive 502 Bad Gateway or 500 with error details

features.name: Reminder System
features.description: Create, fetch and manage reminders (health and personal) and rely on background workers to dispatch notifications and follow-up actions.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token
POST /api/reminders with Authorization: Bearer <token> and body {title, time, type, metadata} -> Receive 201 Created with reminderId
GET /api/reminders with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with list of reminders including created reminder
POST /api/reminders with Authorization: Bearer <token> and missing required fields -> Receive 400 Bad Request with validation errors
GET /api/reminders without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Settings Management
features.description: Retrieve and update user preferences for the assistant (voice profile, reminder defaults, notification channels).
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token
GET /api/settings with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with current user settings
PUT /api/settings with Authorization: Bearer <token> and body {voiceProfile, notificationPrefs} -> Receive 200 with updated settings
PUT /api/settings with Authorization: Bearer <token> and invalid field values -> Receive 400 Bad Request with validation errors
GET /api/settings with expired token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Knowledge & RAG
features.description: Submit user queries to the knowledge/ RAG endpoint to retrieve synthesized answers with source citations using internal knowledge bases and upstream LLMs.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token
POST /api/knowledge with Authorization: Bearer <token> and body {query, contextIds?, maxResults?} -> Receive 200 with answer, score, and source citations
POST /api/knowledge with Authorization: Bearer <token> and large/invalid query payload -> Receive 400 Bad Request or 413 Payload Too Large
POST /api/knowledge with Authorization: Bearer <token> but upstream LLM or vectorstore fails -> Receive 502 Bad Gateway with error details

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: System for user login and registration with personalized sessions

features.name: Voice Assistant Session
features.description: Real-time voice interaction using Gemini Live

features.name: Reminder System
features.description: CRUD operations for health and personal reminders with worker notifications
